data.title: Amazon Shares Rise As Company Says Operations Remain Unaffected Despite Workers At Seven US Facilities Going On Strike Amid Peak Holiday Shopping
data.description: The company accused the Teamsters of misleading the public and attempting to coerce employees and drivers into joining the strike.

data.title: Bitcoin Trust, Cheniere Energy And More On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
data.description: On CNBC's "Halftime Report Final Trades," Stephen Weiss of Short Hills Capital Partners named iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF as his final trade.

data.title: Trump's DJT Connection Drives This Lesser-Known Crypto Stock's Nearly 3X Surge In A Month
data.description: A publicly traded cryptocurrency company’s shares have nearly tripled in a month following reports of a potential acquisition by President-elect Donald Trump’s Trump Media & Technology Group (NASDAQ:DJT).
